verse.name: v1
verse.lines: "Time is no more" The Shout went forth The Voice of Resurrection The last Trump of God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the time of trouble He shall hide me He shall set me up upon a rock In the secret of His tabernacle I will be still, and know I am His Bride

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The Mystery Cloud The wrath of God Revealed sign from Heaven But mercy to His Bride

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He that is unjust will be unjust still He that is filthy, filthy still He that is righteous, Still be righteous He that is holy, holy still.
